component.name: Wombat
component.summary: Effortless unit conversion for scientific computing

description.p: Wombat gives Numbat a friendly face. It’s a graphical environment for unit-aware scientific computing where conversions just work—no more juggling factors or second-guessing results. Type expressions naturally, mix units freely, and let Wombat handle the rest. It keeps your calculations consistent, your units correct, and your workflow smooth.
